news.t: Pacifica Silver Reports Strong Gold-Silver Intercepts at Claudia Project and Extends Justina Vein to 600 Metres in Strike Length
AdvisorShares Applauds Executive Order Accelerating Access to Psychedelic Therapies

holdings.infoBox: PSIL is an equity ETF with a total of 33 individual holdings. The top holdings are COMPASS Pathways stock at 11.18%, AtaiBeckley at 9.14%, Definium Therapeutics at 8.92%, Relmada Therapeutics at 7.80%, and NRx Pharmaceuticals at 7.21%.

overview.description: The AdvisorShares Psychedelics ETF (PSIL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund is actively managed to provide exposure to the emerging global psychedelics industry. PSIL was launched on Sep 15, 2021 and is issued by AdvisorShares.
